Our Universe

"In ancient philosophy, Æther was the fifth element, the invisible substance that binds all things together. We made it visible."

Editorial Legends is the talent division of Ethereal Agency, the world's first agency dedicated exclusively to AI-native creators. Our talent exists at the intersection of technology, fashion, and culture. They are limitless and so are the possibilities for the brands who choose to work with them.

Ivy is softness with an edge. She is the kind of beauty that feels personal, the kind of presence that makes you feel like she is speaking only to you. Her world is K-beauty, femininity, and an emotional depth that her audience can always feel.

Zion walks through museums and makes the art look at him. He is the boy who grew up on Beethoven and buys flowers at 6am just because the morning deserved it. Old money soul with a poet's heart, he makes culture feel like something you can touch.

What We Do

Built for
Brands
Who Lead.

We do not offer influencer marketing. We offer a new category of creative partnership, one without limitations, borders, or constraints. Our creators are always available, always on brand, and always extraordinary.

01
Brand Collaborations
Full campaign management from concept to delivery. Our talent adapts to any brand voice, aesthetic, or direction.
→
02
Editorial Content
High fashion AI imagery, video campaigns, and editorial series for luxury brands and fashion houses worldwide.
→
03
Talent Licensing
License our AI creators for exclusive use in campaigns, packaging, OOH advertising, or digital media.
→
04
Market Penetration
Access Korean, Japanese, and Asian markets through creators who speak the language and own the audience.
→

Why Editorial Legends

The Advantage

∞
No Limitations

Our creators do not get tired, sick, or unavailable. They exist to create 24 hours a day, 365 days a year, across every time zone on earth.

◈
Perfect Brand Fit

Every visual, every caption, every campaign crafted with precision. No off-brand moments. No controversies. No surprises. Ever.

⟡
Global Reach

Korean, Japanese, and English markets all at once. Our creators speak directly to billions of consumers in their own language and culture.

◇
Scalable Content

Ten posts or a thousand, our production scales with your needs at a fraction of what traditional campaigns cost.

✦
First Mover Advantage

Brands who partner with us now will define what AI influence looks like for the next decade. This is still the beginning.

◉
Full Creative Control

You brief us and we execute. Or you let us lead. Either way your brand is always represented exactly as it should be.
